name: Banana Cinnamon Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a deep-fat fryer or deep heavy skillet until ready for frying.
2. Combine flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a large bowl.
3. Cut in margarine using a pastry blender or two knives.
4. Make a well in the center of the mixture and add mashed bananas and eggs. Mix well with a wooden spoon or hands.
5. Roll dough on a lightly floured surface to about 1/2-inch thickness and cut into 2-1/2 inch doughnut shapes using a flour-dipped cutter.
6. Deep-fry doughnuts in batches until golden brown, then drain on paper bags.
7. Combine sugar and cinnamon in a paper bag or shallow plate. Coat the warm doughnuts with this mixture.
Yield: Approximately 22 doughnuts and 22 centers.
Serving Ideas: Fragrant doughnuts for a coffee break.
